trust.title: The Nation's Most Reliable Auto Protection
trust.description: With a network spanning across Canada, Rust Check provides unparalleled protection against the harshest elements.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Thousands Of Drivers Trust Rust Check

features.title: Nationwide Coverage
features.description: Drive with confidence knowing you're protected from coast to coast with our extensive network.

features.title: Fast, Hassle-Free Claims
features.description: Our streamlined process ensures your vehicle gets the attention it needs without the typical red tape.

features.title: 100% Transparent Coverage
features.description: No hidden fees or surprise exclusions. You know exactly what is protected from day one.

features.title: 24/7 Roadside Assistance
features.description: Peace of mind doesn't have business hours. We're here for you whenever and wherever you need us.

testimonials.name: Michael S.
testimonials.text: I’ve been taking my truck here for years. The Canadian winters are brutal on the frame, but thanks to this protection plan, it still looks brand new underneath. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Sarah J.
testimonials.text: The peace of mind is worth every penny. I bought a new SUV and immediately got the protection package. The team was fast, professional, and transparent about everything.

testimonials.name: David L.
testimonials.text: Best investment I made for my car. Resale value stays high, and I don't have to worry about salt eating away at the body panels.

testimonials.name: Emily R.
testimonials.text: Super easy process from start to finish. The 24/7 roadside assistance feature is a fantastic bonus. Great customer service too.
